caption: A man wearing a black jacket over a grey shirt and large black headphones sits in a recording studio. The background consists of dark grey, horizontally ribbed acoustic foam panels. A professional condenser microphone on a boom arm is positioned directly in front of his face. Across the sequence, the man shifts his gaze and posture slightly while speaking. Initially, he looks forward and to the side, gesturing with his right hand near his chest. As the scene progresses, he glances further upward and then shifts his eyes toward the right side of the frame. His facial expression remains relatively neutral, though his lips move as he talks into the microphone. The lighting is soft and consistent, focusing on his face and the metallic finish of the microphone. No text or logos are visible in the scene.
